title: digitaria sanguinalis var. evalvula
intro: Digitaria sanguinalis var. evalvula, also known as small crabgrass, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It has been traditionally used in medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to treat various health issues such as wounds, skin infections, and fever. The health benefits of this plant include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and providing relief from fever and other symptoms of illness. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of Digitaria sanguinalis var. evalvula can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health problems.
